channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kansas remains No. 1 in AP poll, top 10 shuffled with losses by 3 teams; Wisconsin joins rankings
item.description: Kansas strengthened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25. The rest of the top 10 turned into a jumble of teams swapping places. The Jayhawks picked up five first-place votes in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released on Monday, receiving 49 from a 61-person media panel. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lions' Dan Campbell addresses 'bizarre' criticism about taking out starters in blowouts
item.description: Detroit Lions head coach Dan Campbell spoke Sunday after his decision-making process for taking out starters in the midst of blowouts after their latest win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giants to bench Daniel Jones for Week 12: reports
item.description: New York Giants quarterback Daniel Jones will move to QB2 for Week 12 against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, according to multiple reports on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: NBA fines Bucks coach Doc Rivers for comments about call refs admitted they got wrong
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Doc Rivers was right. It still cost him $25,000. Rivers, the coach of the Milwaukee Bucks, was fined by the NBA on Sunday, a day after he publicly criticized the officiating that led to the deciding points in a 115-114 loss to the Charlotte Hornets.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Richardson's late TD run leads Colts to a 28-27 victory over Rodgers and the Jets
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Anthony Richardson was back as the Indianapolis Colts' starting quarterback — and played as though he intends to never leave the huddle again. The No.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US skier Mikaela Shiffrin wins 1st World Cup slalom of season for her 98th career victory
item.description: American ski star Mikaela Shiffrin earned her record-extending 98th career World Cup win Saturday to give herself the chance to compete for victory No. 100 in front of a home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thousands of Netflix users report outages during Tyson-Paul boxing match
item.description: Just as thousands of Netflix users flocked to the app to stream Friday night's head-to-head boxing match between champion Mike Tyson and YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul, the stream crashed.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, WGN 9

item.title: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone miss game against Pelicans for personal reasons
item.description: The Denver Nuggets were without star center Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone for their NBA Cup opener Friday night against the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The world's tallest teenager, 7-foot-9 Olivier Rioux, plans to redshirt at Florida this season
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The world’s tallest teenager might have to wait a year to become the world’s tallest college basketball player. Florida coach Todd Golden says Olivier Rioux, a 7-foot-9 freshman who owns a spot in the Guinness record book, is planning to redshirt.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Finally healthy, Puka Nacua poised for strong finish
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Puka Nacua was not supposed to be this good, this quickly. As a fifth round draft pick out of BYU by the L.A. Rams in 2023, Nacua took the NFL by storm, setting rookie records with 104 catches for 1,486 yards.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Want a Utah Hockey Club jersey? Circle this day on your calendar
item.description: Eager to get your hands on an inaugural Utah Hockey Club jersey? You'll want to circle Friday, Nov. 15.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Utes quarterback Brandon Rose out for the season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a year that has been devasted by season-ending injuries, the Utes football team has suffered another one. After making his first career start, quarterback Brandon Rose has been lost for the year after suffering a lower leg injury in Saturday's 22-21 loss to BYU.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes mired in longest losing streak in 11 years
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It has been one of the most disappointing seasons in Utah football history, and head coach Kyle Whittingham is feeling the pain. "It's been one of the most frustrating seasons of my career," Whittingham said on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Three Padres win Silver Slugger Award
item.description: Three Padres on Tuesday were announced as winners of the Silver Slugger Award in the National League.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5
